creator: nkoch@demig.de
text:
Only patch Makefile and 'make makesum'. It runs for me under 6.1.

--- adzap.old/Makefile  Wed Dec 27 08:29:09 2006
+++ adzap/Makefile      Wed Jan  3 13:25:29 2007
@@ -5,7 +5,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD: ports/www/adzap/Makefile,v 1.49 2006/12/08 01:35:56 kris Exp $
 
 PORTNAME=      adzap
-PORTVERSION=   20061122
+PORTVERSION=   20061217
 CATEGORIES=    www perl5
 MASTER_SITES=  http://adzapper.sourceforge.net/ \
                ${MASTER_SITE_LOCAL}
